title: lithospermum fruticosum f. erectum
intro: Lithospermum fruticosum f. erectum, also known as Gromwell or Blue Gromwell, is a flowering plant in the borage family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithospermum fruticosum f. erectum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Lithospermum fruticosum f. erectum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical creams and ointments for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
